expected.clarification: Ask whether Central Library or East Branch should be used as the library branch for “River Almanac Acquisition.”
response_constraints: Ask one concise question that names the two offered locations: Central Library and East Branch.
Do not retrieve the saved preference, invent a third choice, create anything, or claim the request is complete.

prompt: Please create the title request “River Almanac Acquisition” for 2026-08-10. It could be assigned to Central Library or East Branch, and I have not chosen between them. The library branch matters, so do not guess or use my saved default.
